articles.title: Claude Lemieux’s brain is being donated to Boston University’s CTE Center, his family says
articles.description:
Lemieux died of suicide at age 60 on Thursday, according to authorities, after earlier in the week serving as the Montreal Canadiens' torchbearer prior to a playoff game.

The post Claude Lemieux’s brain is being donated to Boston University’s CTE Center, his family says appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Claude Lemieux, 60, died by suicide on Thursday, impacting the Boston sports community.
His brain will be donated to Boston University's CTE Center for research.
This donation aims to advance understanding of CTE, benefiting local athletes and families.
